title: CT17.decide.scale automation-first node contract
description: An exact projection of the compiled predecessor-indexed Lean node, including its proof-instance boundary and framework-generated outputs.

presentation.summary: Compiled decision node with an explicit automation contract.
presentation.label: CT17.decide.scale

outgoingEdges.constructorType:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT17.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT17.Capability S} →
      {ctx : Core.BranchContext P} →
        {input : CT17.Input S capability ctx} →
          {compatible : CT17.CompatibleState S capability ctx input} →
            CT17.FiniteScaleState S capability ctx input compatible →
              CT17.Graph.Edge S capability ctx input CT17.Graph.NodeId.scale CT17.Graph.NodeId.survivors
